command.description: The value for the key command must be set_importCloudConfig

command_id.description: A unique ID that will be echoed back in the command response by the reader.

hostName.description: Host name of the MQTT Connection

port.description: Port Number of the MQTT Connection

protocol.description: type of protocol to be used. If not provided tcp or ssl determined from enableSecurity flag.

oneOf.title: Endpoint Info String
oneOf.description:
"tcp://host:port"  - TCP (unsecure)

"ssl://host:port"  - SSL/TLS

"ws://host:port"   - Unsecure websockets

"wss://host:port"  - Secure websockets

enableSecurity.description: Enable or Disable Security for MQTT connection

keyFormat.description: Format for the CA Certificate and Public and Private Keys

keyAlgorithm.description: Algorithm used for the CA Certificate and Public and Private Keys

CACertificateFileLocation.description: Path and file name of the CA Certificate

publicKeyFileLocation.description: Path and file name of the Public Key

privateKeyFileLocation.description: Path and file name of the Private Key

verifyHostName.description: check that the server certificate hostname matches the remote. Using this option means that you cannot be sure that the remote host is the server you wish to connect to and so is insecure.

verifyPeer.description: Enables or Disabled verifying that the server cert is for the server to which the message is being posted

installedCertificateName.description: Name of certificate installed on the reader

installedCertificateType.description: Type of certificate installed on the reader

basicAuthentication.title: Basic Authentication for external server connections

keepAlive.description:
The duration (in seconds) to buffer messages when the connection to MQTT is lost

The default keepalive value is 60 seconds, with a minimum of 0 seconds and a maximum of 65,535 seconds.

cleanSession.description: Enables or Disables cleaning session of connection to MQTT

debug.description: Enables or Disables logging of MQTT Debug messages

reconnectDelay.description: The period to attempt reconnection when MQTT connection is lost (in seconds)

reconnectDelayMax.description: Maximum amount of time (in seconds) to attempt to reconnect after MQTT connection is lost (0 indicates continuing to try "forever")

qos.description: Sets the Quality of Service for the MQTT Connection

retain.description: stores the latest message on a topic, delivering it to any new subscribers immediately upon connection.

publishTopic.description: Topic to which to publish messages

verifyPeer.description: Enables or Disabled verifying that the server cert is for the server to which the message is being posted

verifyHost.description: Enable or Disable verifiying that host name in the certificate is valid for the host name to which messages are being posted

authenticationType.description: Type of Authentication to use when posting message

oneOf.title: HTTP Post Basic Authentication
oneOf.description: Configuration of HTTP Post Basic Authentication

publicKeyFileLocation.description: Path and file name of the Public Key

privateKeyFileLocation.description: Path and file name of the Private Key

installedCertificateName.description: Name of certificate installed on the reader

installedCertificateType.description: Type of certificate installed on the reader

CACertificateFileLocation.description: Path and file name of the CA Certificate

verifyPeer.description: Enables or Disabled verifying that the server cert is for the server to which the message is being posted

CACertificateFileLocation.description: Path and file name of the CA Certificate

installedCertificateName.description: Name of certificate installed on the reader

installedCertificateType.description: Type of certificate installed on the reader

useLocalCerts.description: Enable or Disable use of local certificates

keepAlive.description: The time (in seconds) the connection needs to remain idle before TCP begins sending keepalive probes to check if the connection is still alive.

keepAliveCount.description: The maximum number of keepalive probes TCP should send before deciding that the connection is dead and closing it.

keepAliveInterval.description: The interval (in seconds) between successive keepalive probes if no acknowledgment is received from the remote host.

verifyPeer.description: Enables or Disabled verifying that the server cert is for the server to which the message is being posted

verifyHost.description: Enable or Disable verifiying that host name in the certificate is valid for the host name to which messages are being posted

retention.title: Tag Data Events Retention Configuration
retention.description: Tag Data Events Retention Configuration on connection lost

throttle.description: Rate (in events per second) to report data events when network is reconnected

maxNumEvents.description: Maximum number of events to retain

maxEventRetentionTimeInMin.description:
Maximum event retention time (in minutes)

0 indicate Events will be retained Forever.

Example:
10 indicate Events generated in last 10 minutes will be retained

publishTopic.description: List of topics to publish to

verifyHostName.description: Enable or Disable host name verification

installedCertificateName.description: Name of certificate installed on the reader.

installedCertificateType.description: Type of certificate installed on the reader

retain.description: stores the latest message on a topic, delivering it to any new subscribers immediately upon connection.

alpnProtocolNames.description: ALPN protocol name is needed if selected port is 443

publishTopic.description: List of topics to publish to

verifyHostName.description: Enable or Disable host name verification

installedCertificateName.description: Name of certificate installed on the reader.

installedCertificateType.description: Type of certificate installed on the reader

batching.title: Tag Data Events batching configuration
batching.description:
Tag Data Events batching configuration

NOTE : Batching can be disabled by configuring maxPayloadSizePerReport and reportingInterval to 0.

reportingInterval.description: Event Report interval in milliseconds.(default: 2000 milliseconds for HTTP POST Endpoint).

maxPayloadSizePerReport.description: Maximum payload size in bytes.(default: 256000 bytes for HTTP POST Endpoint).
